name: esxL
function: Secreted protein with similarity to Esat-6, involved in host-pathogen interaction and potentially peptidoglycan hydrolase activity (PMID 22291682, PMID 25961021). It encodes a peptide that demonstrated tuberculosis-specific cellular interferon-u03b3 production (PMID 24447912).
infection_impact: Essential for Mtb infection as a key antigen recognized by the host's immune system (PMID 24447912). Highly expressed during active human lung infection and can modulate growth of intracellular bacteria in trans (PMID 22291682). Potential vaccine target due to its antigenicity (PMID 25961021).
